title: Collection properties should be read-only
messageFormat: Remove the setter from this collection property and let callers mutate the existing instance.
summary: A collection property with a public setter lets callers swap the whole container for a different instance, including null. Code that captured the previous reference keeps mutating an object the owner no longer sees, and every access has to defend against the property being reassigned.
Expose the collection through a getter only and initialize it once. Callers add and remove items on the owned instance, and the owner keeps control of the container's lifetime.
